metadata.name: Apple Studio Display XDR 27" Standard Glass Tilt- and Height-Adjustable Stand
metadata.variant: Standard Glass, Tilt- and Height-Adjustable Stand

connectors: 2 x Thunderbolt 5 (USB-C; one upstream with 140W host charging, one downstream), 2 x USB-C 3.2 Gen 2
hdr: Retina XDR; 2000 nits peak HDR, 1000 nits SDR, 1,000,000:1 contrast ratio
